description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image and runs a before_script to install tox. Define two jobs in the default test stage: test:manifest and test:pep8, each limited to the master branch and set to run always. In test:manifest set the variable TOX_ENV to manifest and execute the command tox -e $TOX_ENV. In test:pep8 set TOX_ENV to pep8 and execute tox -e $TOX_ENV. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
